title: Foundations SMP - Resource Pack
description: Resource pack for Foundations SMP plugin
body:
Resource pack for the Foundations SMP plugin. Adds custom texture for the Rune item in the plugin, as well as the reroll item. It also adds custom ability cooldown bars in the bottom right hand corner, next to your hotbar. 

If you choose not to install, use /togglebar to hide the unicode characters.

May not work below 1.21.11, so be aware of this please.

Shoutout to cloudwolf for the unicode tutorial
